start_message: ◉ BLACK ROOM RADIO BOT Hey, {name}! Your personal DJ in Telegram. Three sources. One bot. TEQUILA MUSIC · FULLMOON TRIP SOUND · BLACK ROOM
help_message: Commands: /search <query> — search for a track /top — top tracks /history — your recent searches /settings — audio quality /lang — change language /help — this message Recognition: send a voice message, audio or video — the bot will identify the track via Shazam and download it In DM: just type a track name In groups: play Drake or /search Drake
search_prompt: Type a track name or artist:
no_results: Nothing found. Try a different query.
error_download: Failed to download the track. Try another one.
error_age_restricted: △ This track is age-restricted (18+). Try another one.
error_geo_restricted: △ This track is not available in your region. Try another one.
error_timeout: △ Server is not responding — please try again in a minute.
error_too_large: △ Track is too large. Trying lower bitrate...
error_too_large_final: Track is too long to send via Telegram.
error_too_long: Track is longer than 10 minutes — can't download.
rate_limit_cooldown: ◔ Please wait {seconds}s before the next request.
rate_limit_exceeded: ✖ Hourly limit reached (10 tracks/hour). Try Premium for unlimited.
history_empty: You haven't searched for anything yet.
session_expired: Search session expired. Please search again.
radio_tequila_offline: ▸ TEQUILA LIVE Stream coming soon. Stay tuned!
radio_fullmoon_offline: ◑ FULLMOON LIVE Stream coming soon. Stay tuned!
automix_coming_soon: ✦ AUTO MIX Crossfade mixing with BPM analysis coming soon! Version v1.3
live_no_tracks: No tracks in this channel yet. Admin can load them with /admin load
recommend_no_history: ◈ Listen to a few tracks first — then I'll build a personal playlist for you.
premium_info: ◇ BLACK ROOM Premium Free: • 10 tracks/hour • 128-192 kbps Premium: • Unlimited • Up to 320 kbps + FLAC • Batch playlist download • Priority queue • Full lyrics • VIP badge in playlists • No ads in caption One-time purchases: • 5 ★ → 1 FLAC track • 3 ★ → no ads for 24h • 50 ★ → Premium 7 days
premium_active: ◇ BLACK ROOM Premium is active until {until} All features unlocked. Enjoy!
premium_soon:
★ Telegram Stars payments coming soon!

Stay tuned for updates.

onboard_q3: Type up to 5 favorite artists, separated by commas: e.g. Drake, The Weeknd, Billie Eilish

micro_flac_success: ✧ FLAC credit added! Use it on your next download.
referral_info: 🤝 Referral Program Your link: {link} 👥 Invited: {count} 🎵 Bonus tracks/day: +{bonus} • +5 tracks/day per friend (up to +50) • 10 friends → 3 days Premium • 50 friends → 30 days Premium
referral_welcome: 👋 You were invited by a friend! Welcome to BLACK ROOM.

✦ Generating AUTO MIX...
This may take a minute.

automix_error: Failed to create mix. Try again later.
youtube_link_detected: ● YouTube link detected. Converting to audio...
yandex_link_detected: ● Yandex Music link detected. Loading track...
quality_premium_only: ▣ 320 kbps is available only for Premium subscribers
pl_track_exists: This track is already in the playlist.
pl_empty_create_first: No playlists yet. Create one via /playlist
pl_track_no_file: Track not downloaded yet. Find it via search first.
pl_import_error: Import error. Check the JSON file format.
captcha_blocked: ⛔ Too many wrong attempts. Wait {minutes} min.
shazam_not_recognized: ◈ Could not recognize the track. Try sending a longer fragment (at least 5 seconds).
faq_search_text: In DM: Just type a track name or artist — the bot will find results. Pick one — it'll be downloaded and sent. Command /search: /search Imagine Dragons Links: • Yandex Music — paste a link like https://music.yandex.ru/album/.../track/... — bot downloads that exact track at 320 kbps • Spotify — paste a track link — bot finds and downloads it Sources (searched in order): 1. Local DB (TEQUILA / FULLMOON channels) 2. Yandex Music — up to 320 kbps 3. Spotify 4. SoundCloud 5. VK Music 6. YouTube — last resort Limits: • Max duration — 10 minutes • Max file size — 45 MB • If too large, bitrate is automatically reduced
faq_group_text: Add the bot to a group chat for everyone to search music. Triggers: • /search Drake • play Imagine Dragons • @TSmymusicbot_bot query How it works: • Bot auto-downloads the first match • Cleans up messages after sending • Ignores random messages without triggers
faq_inline_text: Type @TSmymusicbot_bot query in any chat — results appear in the input field. Previously downloaded tracks are sent instantly from cache.
faq_recognize_text: Send the bot: • Voice message — record the playing track • Audio file — send a snippet • Video — send a video with sound Bot identifies it via Shazam and offers to download. Requirements: • At least 5 seconds • Max 20 MB • Cleaner audio = better recognition
faq_charts_text: Command /charts — live charts from 5 sources: 🎵 Apple Music Global ▶ YouTube Music Top 🇷🇺 Yandex Top Russia 📻 Russkoye Radio 🎶 Europa Plus TOP40 Refreshed every 6 hours. Tap any track to download.
faq_radio_text: ▸ TEQUILA LIVE — TEQUILA MUSIC broadcast ◑ FULLMOON LIVE — FULLMOON TRIP SOUND broadcast Play in order or shuffle. ✦ AUTO MIX — pick a genre, bot creates a personal mix.
faq_recommend_text: Button "Your taste" in main menu. Bot analyzes your listening history and picks music for you. Improve recommendations: • Listen more — profile updates every 10 plays • Complete onboarding (genre → vibe → favorite artists) • Rate tracks ❤️ / 👎
faq_playlist_text: Command /playlist • Up to 20 playlists, 50 tracks each • After downloading, tap + ▸ to add to playlist • Play in order or shuffle
faq_video_text:
Command /video — search & download YouTube clips.

Quality: 360p / 480p / 720p
faq_premium_text: Free: 10 tracks/hour, 5s cooldown, up to 192 kbps Premium (150 Stars): Unlimited, 1s cooldown, 320 kbps, 30 days Buy: Premium button in menu → Pay Stars
faq_profile_text:
/profile — your profile
/stats — download statistics
/history — recent searches
/top — global top tracks
